1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

2.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons intersecting Trondheim bbox

4.description: find buildings that intersect quick-clay hazard polygons

5.description: compute distance from intersecting buildings to municipality centroid

6.description: one row per building with minimum distance

9.description: select output columns: building id, bygningsnummer, distance_m

args.sql:
SELECT k.kartleggingsomradeid, k.kartleggingsomradenavn, u.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, u.skredfaregradklasse, u.omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade k
JOIN kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr u
  ON ST_Intersects(k.omrade, u.omrade)
WHERE ST_Intersects(k.omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%'))
  AND (u.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse ILIKE '%hoy%' OR u.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse ILIKE '%high%' OR u.skredfaregradklasse ILIKE '%hoy%' OR u.skredfaregradklasse ILIKE '%high%');

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, skredfaregradklasse
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningsnummer, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '5001' AND stedfestingverifisert = TRUE;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

2.description: inspect quick-clay risk class distinct values in utlosningomr

3.description: get buildings in Trondheim municipality with verified location

4.description: get quick-clay polygons filtered to the high risk class and within Trondheim municipality

5.description: find buildings that intersect the filtered quick-clay polygons

6.description: calculate distance from matched buildings to the municipality centroid

7.description: collapse to one row per building using MIN(distance_m)

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, skredfaregradklasse
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningsnummer, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '5001' AND stedfestingverifisert = TRUE;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, skredfaregradklasse, omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr
WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = '4';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 4
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"
